findings.description: The property table adds a '型' column with values 'SimpleDbTransactionManager' and 'String'. The source table has only two columns: 'property 名' and '設定内容' — no type column exists. The 'String' type for tableName, idColumnName, langColumnName, and valueColumnName has no basis in the source. A 'デフォルト値' (default value) column is also added, which the source does not contain.

The property table adds '型', '必須', and 'デフォルト値' columns not present in the source table. The source only has 'property名' and '設定内容' columns. Presenting 'StaticDataCache' as a formal type column entry fabricates a structural element not found in the source, even though the word appears in the description text.
